result:
**Infrastructure ops log:** 16 services (metrics-collector, export-pipeline, session-manager, audit-logger, report-builder, search-indexer, auth-service, notification-daemon, webhook-relay, scheduler-core, billing-worker, ingest-api, cache-warmer, user-profile-service) across environments (green/blue pools, canary, staging, production, QA, dev sandbox).

**Operations:** scaling, patching, health checks, migrations, drains, downgrades, rollbacks, redeployments, restarts, reconfigurations, upgrades, pauses, resumptions at 09:15, 11:05, 14:40, 16:20, evening shift, afternoon, lunch, standup, sprint day, sync call.

**Outcomes:** mostly completed; manual retries: metrics-collector staging 16:20, session-manager green lunch; alerts cleared, error rates stabilized, memory pressure reduced, CPU baseline restored, smoke tests passed, dashboards confirmed, no customer impact, pagers quiet, follow-up config tasks filed, documentation updated.

**Critical codes:** BXJVHAQM, 64ZFDU3X, RP5U7VJF, 8JZC8UH6, DFRYMYBU, U4AZGEMK, 4EKRSGHM, 5BSM663A, R6GRJEJW, C5TXG76Q, RC3XZMH6, ZTGY4WFP, 658G5J6W, T8SVCFB6, H25223A6, QHX9HWNR.
